---
title: "Global NCP Workflow"
format: html
---

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    %% Subgraph Styling
    style INPUTS fill:#F8F9FA,stroke:#D3D3D3,stroke-width:2px
    style PROCESSING fill:#F8F9FA,stroke:#D3D3D3,stroke-width:2px
    style OUTPUTS fill:#F8F9FA,stroke:#D3D3D3,stroke-width:2px

    %% Input Layer
    subgraph INPUTS ["<span style='font-size: 30px; font-weight: bold; color: #222222;'>Inputs</span><br/>"]
        direction TB
        RawES["<b>Global ES Models</b> <br/> 300m Rasters <i>(1992 & 2020)</i>"]
        RawLC["<b>ESA CCI Land Cover</b> <br/> 300m Rasters <i>(1992 & 2020)</i>"]
        RawSoc["<b>Socioeconomic Data</b> <br/> Rasters <i>(Pop, GDP, HDI)</i>"]
        RawGrid["<b>IUCN AOO 10km Master Grid</b> <br/> <i>Vector with Subregional Attributes</i>"]
    end

    %% Processing Layer
    subgraph PROCESSING ["<span style='font-size: 30px; font-weight: bold; color: #222222;'>Processing</span><br/>"]
        direction TB
        IntA["<b>Path A: Global Trajectories</b> <br/> Zonal Summaries <i>(1992 & 2020)</i>"]
        IntB["<b>Path B: Grid Analysis</b> <br/> 10km Zonal Summaries <i>(1992 & 2020)</i>"]
        Math["<b>Metrics Calculation</b> <br/> Symmetric % Change (SPC) <br/> & Absolute Difference"]

        MathLC["<b>Land Cover Transitions</b> <br/> Reclassified LC Contingency <br/> Matrices per 10km Gridcell"]
        MathSoc["<b>Socioeconomic Stats & KS Tests</b> <br/> 10km Grid Aggregation <br/> & Statistical Profiling"]
    end

    %% Outputs Layer
    subgraph OUTPUTS ["<span style='font-size: 30px; font-weight: bold; color: #222222;'>Outputs</span><br/>"]
        direction TB
        P1["<b>Global Trajectories</b> <br/> <i style='font-size: 25px; font-weight: normal;'>Bar Charts, Summary Tables, <br/> & Cartographies (GPKGs)</i>"]
        P2["<b>Hotspot Detection (Top/Bottom 5%)</b> <br/> <i style='font-size: 25px; font-weight: normal;'>Abs & SPC GPKGs, Synthesis Maps, <br/> & Distribution Plots</i>"]
        P3["<b>Attribution Gap</b> <br/> <i style='font-size: 25px; font-weight: normal;'>LCC Overlap CSVs, Heatmaps, <br/> Scatterplots, & Driver Maps</i>"]
        P4["<b>Equity & Exposure</b> <br/> <i style='font-size: 25px; font-weight: normal;'>KS Test Plots & <br/> Population Exposure CSVs</i>"]
    end

    %% Logical Connections
    RawGrid ==> IntB

    RawES ==> IntA
    RawES ==> IntB

    IntA ==> Math
    IntB ==> Math

    Math ==> P1
    Math ==> P2

    %% Downstream Analysis from Hotspots (P2)
    P2 ==> P3
    RawLC ==> MathLC
    MathLC ==> P3

    P2 ==> P4
    RawSoc ==> MathSoc
    MathSoc ==> P4

    %% Layout Guides (Forces boxes to match heights and center-align)
    RawGrid ~~~ MathSoc
    IntA ~~~ P1

    %% Visual Styling - WWF Palette
    classDef inputs fill:#F2F2F2,stroke:#D9D9D9,stroke-width:2px,color:#333,font-size:23px;
    classDef processing fill:#E1F5FE,stroke:#01579B,stroke-width:2px,color:#01579B,font-size:23px;
    classDef pillar fill:#006743,stroke:#004D33,stroke-width:3px,color:#FFF,font-weight:bold,font-size:27px;

    %% Explicit Class Assignments
    class RawES,RawLC,RawSoc,RawGrid inputs;
    class IntA,IntB,Math,MathLC,MathSoc processing;
    class P1,P2,P3,P4 pillar;
```
